texto: I am a fighter. I believe in that which is right, and the truth is, I have been the Lone Ranger for the past thirty years and I will not give up the fight. I love my public and I'll fight for you. I'll continue to make personal appearances for my thousands of fans.
explicacao: Citação de Clayton Moore sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I am a fighter. I believe in that which is right, and the truth is, I have been the Lone Ranger f…” articula reflexao, love, i-am em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como i-am e past.

frase_original: I am a fighter. I believe in that which is right, and the truth is, I have been the Lone Ranger for the past thirty years and I will not give up the fight. I love my public and I'll fight for you. I'll continue to make personal appearances for my thousands of fans.
